results.title: Disney vs. Universal: The 2026 Theme Park Battle
Netflix, Disney+ bundle, Max top 2026 streaming rankings
Comcast Adds Disney+, Hulu and HBO Max to Xfinity StreamSaver Bundles, Offering Discounts of Up to 45%
Disney vs. Comcast: Which Media Giant Has Better Upside Potential?
Disney vs. Comcast: Which Theme Park Giant is a Stronger Pick?

summary: Epic Universe (Universal) opened 2025, driving 12% YoY attendance growth at Universal Orlando vs Disney World's steadier 3%. Netflix maintains dominance at 300M+ subscribers. Comcast bundling Disney+/Hulu/Max in Xfinity StreamSaver at up to 45% discount. Disney fully acquired Hulu ($9B deal closed June 2025) and plans to merge it into Disney+ app. Disney content spend guided at $24B in 2026.
